patterns.documentation_pattern: Standard markdown-based project documentation following open-source best practices
patterns.feature_pattern: Individual feature specifications in docs/features/ directory

existing_implementations.description: This is a greenfield project with no existing code or documentation

documentation_goals: Create version-controlled project overview and getting started guide (README.md)
Define development roadmap with MVP scope and milestones (ROADMAP.md)
Document architecture decisions and design patterns (docs/ARCHITECTURE.md)
